positive: A highly detailed, symmetrical central composition of ethereal woodland spirits and mystical fauna. The scene should feature stylized, glowing fox spirits and ancient, curling roots intertwined with bioluminescent flora. Dominant colors are deep indigo, sapphire blue, emerald green, and shimmering gold accents. The style is a blend of neo-traditional engraving and ethereal fantasy illustration, emphasizing strong, clean silhouettes, high contrast, and intricate linework suitable for screen printing. The composition must be centered, circular, and highly ornamental, designed to appear seamless when printed on dark apparel fabric. Global illumination, magical glow, symmetrical composition, graphic art.
